rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MINNIE MARGARET SANTOS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Response To Demand For Production Of Documents And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Grant. No opposition. Respondent Mary Lopez is ordered to pay sanctions in the amount of $500.00 plus $40.00 for the filing fee to Contestant's attorney. Moving party to prepare order.
